title: ilex paltoria
intro: Ilex paltoria, also known as the Yaupon holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to Eastern North America. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ilex paltoria include reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The leaves can be prepared as a tea, or used in herbal infusions, to reap the benefits of this plant's medicinal properties.
